{{Quote|Always knew he wouldn't make it.|Aalto, commenting on Obi-Wan Kenobi being sent to the Agricultural Corps|<ref name="JA2: TRF" />}}
'''Aalto''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] [[Human/Legends|Human]]<ref name="DB" /> who lived during the waning [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. They were accepted by the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] to be [[Jedi training/Legends|trained]] at the [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Jedi Temple]] on the Republic's [[Capital/Legends|capital]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]], [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. There, Aalto befriended fellow [[Jedi Initiate/Legends|Jedi Initiate]] [[Bruck Chun]].<ref name="JA2: TRF" /> In [[44 BBY/Legends|44 BBY]],<ref name="TNEC">''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]''</ref> another Initiate named [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] was not accepted for training as a [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] and sent to the [[Agricultural Corps/Legends|Agricultural Corps]]. Together with Chun, Aalto often teased Kenobi about his failure.<ref name="DB" /><ref name="JA2: TRF" />

==Behind the scenes==
Aalto first appeared in the [[1999]] young-readers novel ''[[Jedi Apprentice: The Rising Force]]'', which was written by [[Dave Wolverton]] as the first installment of the ''[[Star Wars: Jedi Apprentice]]'' series.<ref name="JA2: TRF" />
